title: Pan and Zoom controls in image gallery
excerpt: Please Please can we have view controls such as zoom and pan in the gallery view. As a graphics firm we work primarily with images and not having these tools prevents us from using files in Monday. Will this be a feature…

posts.author: gmh_2001 (Gethin Hooper)
posts.cookedHtml: Please Please can we have view controls such as zoom and pan in the gallery view. As a graphics firm we work primarily with images and not having these tools prevents us from using files in Monday. Will this be a feature in an upcoming release?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! We wanted to let you know that we will be merging this topic into this already existing feature request - Pan and Zoom controls in image gallery - in order to consolidate matching threads and ensure votes are accurate and up-to-date. If you did not cast a vote on this topic, please add your vote to the active thread above. Thanks for your understanding
